target.name: Physical Intelligence
target.founder: Karol Hausman, Sergey Levine, Chelsea Finn, Brian Ichter

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $5.6B last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 5 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in AI & Software. Range: $3.2B - $39.0B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in AI & Compute

private.name: Black Forest Labs
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Series B), post-money $3.25B

data.narrative:
Physical Intelligence, a Series B AI & Software company founded by Hausman, Levine, Finn, and Ichter, carries a current post-money valuation of $5.6B following $600M+ in total funding. The valuation assessment relies on a comparables universe of 9 private peers and 1 public comparable (Palantir), all operating in AI & Software at Series A through Series C stages. Top private comparables include Figure AI ($39.0B, Series C), Skild AI ($14.0B, Series C), and Black Forest Labs ($3.2B, Series B).

Two valuation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis applies a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical of Series B advancement, yielding $10.6B. Peer-median methodology across five same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables (Figure AI, Skild AI, Reflection AI, Together AI, Black Forest Labs) establishes a median valuation of $8.0B, with a range spanning $3.2B to $39.0B. The wide dispersion reflects material heterogeneity in the peer set by stage and market positioning.

Triangulation across both methods supports a valuation range of $6.8B to $12.2B, with a midpoint of $9.3B. The current $5.6B valuation sits below this implied range, suggesting potential upside pending Series C fundraising. Key uncertainties include the appropriate stage-progression multiple given frontier-tech market volatility and the relevance of outlier comparables (Figure AI at $39.0B) to Physical Intelligence's specific market trajectory and technical differentiation.
